situation: Standalone adversarial review of a just-completed code change in a repo WITH a runnable test suite (a real deterministic oracle).

target.summary: A refactor of discount calculation. The suite has a detectable runner (pytest). Running it yields one failing test (test_bulk_discount_rounding) — a real, oracle-backed defect. There is also a soft concern: the extracted function name 'calc2' is non-intention-revealing.

intent: Refactor discount calculation without changing behavior.

dispatch_input.oracle_result: <the pytest result above — inherited, not re-run by the reviewer>
